content: Is anyone else observing lore lagging some 9 hours, perhaps suffering an outage?
I have seen delays in the past -- I guess it should resolve itself. If not, please ping and we can ask.

It looks like more than a delay, see e.g. https://lore.kernel.org/all/CAJ-ks9nRmR-w6xAyWkVt-NH9pO+Ec_ehE9rJU+6LQBCYsgWd0w@mail.gmail.com/. This message is a reply, but the message it's replying to is absent =/

Hmm... It shows for me.

(Having said that, it could be, I guess, that messages may be delayed depending where they are coming from; though in this case it is both you)
https://lore.kernel.org/all/ shows the last message with a timestamp of "2025-02-11 6:07 UTC" for me
I think they have several locations, it could be they are not all up to date.

Miguel Ojeda said:

Hmm... It shows for me.

(Having said that, it could be, I guess, that messages may be delayed depending where they are coming from; though in this case it is both you)

Weird, it shows for me now too! Though I am on a different machine now.

Miguel Ojeda said:

I think they have several locations, it could be they are not all up to date.

That sounds plausible.
seeing delay again on my geo-located mirror ams.source.kernel.org / 145.40.68.75. latest mail is from 8:47 (almost 4 hours ago) and I think I noticed that on monday as well.
seems to be happening a lot recently (at least to me)
There's weird caching happening on lore, I often have to force-refresh
Oh, I'm not seeing that. Do you have a VPN you can use to try to route around whatever is happening near you?
ah that's a good idea, let me try
all of europe seems to have the same issue, but canada/usa don't :shrug:
Yeah, I have been having issues for the past few days, on and off. I pinged them about it.
Same here, got lots of 503 in last ~4 days
